findings_addressed: 1 [high]: probe_wal_sidecar bounded read — std::fs::read replaced with File::open + read_exact(&mut [u8; 32]); new test probe_wal_sidecar_bounded_read builds a 256 MiB sparse WAL sidecar with valid magic + invalid page size and asserts Engine::open completes in <= 200 ms (red against the unbounded impl at ~318 ms on the dev runner, green after the fix at <1 ms)

2 [medium]: AC-034b harness uses per-trial sentinel-wait + full-N p99 — victim writes FATHOMDB_POWER_CUT_VICTIM_SENTINEL after its first commit lands; parent blocks on the sentinel (5 s budget) before sampling the kill delay; lost_commit_ms is mandatory u128 (no Option/filter); p99 computed across the full P_PWR_TRIALS = 100 set; sentinel timeout surfaces as harness panic with runaway-victim SIGKILL guard

3 [medium]: AC-035c lock-released asserts via spawned sibling process — new linux-only #[ignore] entry-point _lock_acquire_probe_entry routed via FATHOMDB_TEST_LOCK_PROBE; parent spawns child via Command::new(current_exe()), child attempts flock(LOCK_EX | LOCK_NB) and exits 0/1; parent asserts exit success; existing in-process fd reacquire kept as additional sanity check
4 [low]: AC-034c body is now panic!() carrying the substrate-gap text + pointer to output JSON blocker-3 — clearing #[ignore] without landing the KVM image fails loudly instead of green-passing
notes: Finding 1 bounded-read assertion uses wall-clock-only signal (per prompt fallback): no read_bytes_counter test hook was added because that would require engine surface expansion. 256 MiB sparse WAL fixture gives ~300+ ms vs <1 ms separation on the dev runner — well clear of the 200 ms budget either way. RSS measurement skipped for portability.
Same-process fd reacquire retained in AC-035c tests alongside the sibling-process check; reviewer signal was 'useful but not the contract', so kept as belt-and-suspenders rather than removed.

long_run_results_post_fix.ac_034b_lost_commit_p99_ms: 1 (computed across full 100-trial set; sentinel-wait fence guarantees every trial committed at least one row before SIGKILL — no Option/filter)

regression_results.agent_verify_result: pass (one known-flake retry on ac_017_vector_projection_freshness_p99_le_five_seconds per prompt allowance)

next_step_for_orchestrator: promote to 0.6.0-rewrite; respawn codex reviewer for clean PASS
